message: Jake
Yuriko
Meryl
−　The Next Day　−
I have to inform everyone about a very unfortunate incident.
Uh-huh.
It seems that the popular talent, Cindy, has been murdered by someone.
This tragic event has taken place.
Unfortunately, her body was recovered from a trash can.
is.
There are reports that she is missing her left leg and right ankle, and some are pointing out the connection to a serial murder case.
Currently, the key suspect appears to be Guy Goldstein, a player affiliated with NETS.
But is it really okay for such things to happen in the world? On one hand, we have a popular talent, and on the other, a well-known Major League Baseball player.
This is just my personal view, but there was a report in BAM magazine about Guy and Cindy being in a hot romance.
The article's insider, writer Eva Courtney, and her partner,
if both Cindy and Shin are murdered,
it really makes my suspicions about Guy swell.
Also, they say he is currently missing, which makes him even more suspicious.
Boss, did you see the news today?
I did.
It’s almost like they’re saying Guy is the culprit, right?
That’s true. Sure, we don’t know Guy’s whereabouts, but that doesn’t justify calling him a criminal.
Yeah. I’m not even a fan of Guy, but it still ticks me off a bit.
So, who do you think killed Cindy?
I think the most likely person among those I know is Kristy.
Oh, please don’t get mad.
I’m not really mad or anything.
But if we focus on the motive, Kristy does have a grudge against Eva.
Oh, so the boss suspects she's the culprit too!?
No, she's just not the kind of person who could do something like that.
I get what you mean, but if you think about it calmly, she does seem suspicious. It's just about Eva and Cindy.
Even looking just at the Eva and Cindy situation...
Still, I really don't think it's Kristy.
Come on, you're just being biased.
It's not bias, okay? Think about it normally; she couldn't cut someone up.
Why not?
Because she doesn't have any medical knowledge. Using a scalpel for dismemberment isn't something someone untrained can manage.
Well, if she studies, she'd be just fine.
If you put it that way...
It means she might have the potential to be the culprit.
What?! Am I the culprit?
ＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲＲ
Oh, a call.
Oh, I'll take it.
Hello?
called and was summoned to St. Regis Hotel.
Got it, I...
the one who killed Ariana was Gai.
You watched the news, right?
Bring out Gai. You know where he is.
No, I don't know where he is either.
Liar. You really know, don't you?
No.
Gai is the one who killed Ariana! Are you planning to cover for him?
I really don't know.
Liar, liar, liar! Stop hiding and tell me! I'm going to take revenge for my daughter!
Take revenge?
W-Wait a minute.
I'm going to kill Guy! I'm going to kill him! I'll chop him up and get my revenge!
She said that and started beating my body.
Sobbing and in a half-crazed state, she kept repeating that she would kill him.
No matter how I tried to calm her down, nothing would reach her ears.
Where is Guy?
What is he doing, and where exactly?
I wished he would come out right now and clear up all the misunderstandings.
I was thinking about such things while being hit.
